issues.title: Add Mistral AI documentation.
issues.body:
After the merge of https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/369 add
* Mistral AI Chat client docs under: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/tree/main/spring-ai-docs/src/main/antora/modules/ROOT/pages/api/clients
* Mistral Ai Embedding docs under: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/tree/main/spring-ai-docs/src/main/antora/modules/ROOT/pages/api/embeddings
* Add a mistral chat and embedding items in the catalog: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/spring-ai-docs/src/main/antora/modules/ROOT/nav.adoc
